chapter_title.en: Enduring like free people or remaining silent like the ignorant

text: ٤١٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَنْ صَبَرَ صَبْرَ الْأَحْرَارِ، وَإِلَّا سَلاَ سُلُوَّ الْأَغْمَارِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 413. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: One should endure like free people, otherwise one should keep quite like the ignorant.
